summary: The eth-wire broadcast divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in latest-hash selection, transaction-hash list decoding, and retained-hash partitioning; no wire behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 142: M	crates/net/eth-wire-types/src/broadcast.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to an inline return, ListLengthMismatch returns, `Self::empty()`, and a retain-closure `return false`.
No latest block-hash comparison, pooled transaction hash/type/size length validation, retain count, rest partitioning, or hash insertion behavior changed.
